title: Backend Developer
description: Hesap positions itself as Turkey’s next-generation financial product comparison platform. It is an AI-powered, one-stop financial platform that enables individuals to make informed financial decisions by providing seamless access to the most competitive banking and financial products — including loans, credit cards, deposit options, electronic money solutions, open banking, and investment products — all within a single platform. Powered by AI-driven, real-time data and insights, Hesap delivers personalized financial recommendations through an integrated network of financial institutions, ensuring a transparent, efficient, and superior user experience. We are looking for Backend Developer (Kotlin/Java) to join our dynamic and fast-paced team. To build a best-in-class fintech platform, you will work with product managers, QA engineers, backend, frontend, and mobile developers. What do we expect from you? Bachelor's degree in computer engineering, mathematics, or other related fields, Minimum 2 years experience in backend software development Strong understanding of software development methodologies, Proven ability to troubleshoot complex issues and solve problems efficiently, Effective communication skills Expert knowledge of object-oriented concepts and technologies such as software architectures, design patterns Professional experience with Kotlin or Java (willingness to learn Kotlin is a plus!). If you have strong Java experience and a willingness to learn Kotlin, we would love to hear from you Experience with Spring (Spring Framework, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Data, etc.) Hands-on experience with API design Experience with relational databases like PostgreSQL, Oracle, etc. Experience with NoSQL databases like MongoDB, Redis, Couchbase, etc. Experience with message queues like Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc. Experience with container technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, etc. Experience with cloud platforms like GCP, AWS, Azure, or Huawei Cloud Knowledge on distributed systems and microservice architecture is a plus Strong desire to learn and explore innovative technologies What will you do when you join us? Work within an agile team to define, design, build and ship new features and extend existing ones Analyze requirements and constraints, propose innovative solutions, and evaluate their impact on business goals Collaborate with your team and business stakeholders to develop solutions that maximize customer value and drive continuous improvement Write clean, maintainable code with unit tests and participate in peer code-reviews Contribute to implement the software engineering best practices for the full software development life cycle including software design, coding standards, code reviews, test processes, deployment strategies, and maintenance Actively contribute to the continuous improvement of our development processes and engineering culture Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry trends, applying them to enhance our projects Your personal data is shared with our company, Hesap Bilgi Hizmetleri ve Teknoloji A.Ş ., as the data controller, in order to carry out the recruitment process. It will be processed by. You can access detailed information about the processing of your personal data and your rights via https://hesap.com/bilgi-guvenligi/calisan-adayi-aydinlatma-metni

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Role Overview Job Title: Fullstack Engineer (Java + React) Location: Remote (Candidates must reside in Turkey) Contract: 6 months (highly likely to extend) Cressoft is hiring Fullstack Engineers to support a long-term platform transformation for one of the UK’s leading retail and e-commerce companies. As part of this initiative, you’ll help modernize the core transactional flows—Checkout, Payments, Basket, and Post-Order—across a platform that serves over 70% of the UK population. this post is ONLY for 4+ years experienced people, please do not apply if your experience is less, as it will be automatically rejected. Please follow this page, as we will post new roles soon 🔍 What You’ll Do Build and enhance customer-facing and backend features using Java 8+ , React , and TypeScript Contribute to the re-architecture of high-traffic retail systems for scalability and performance Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams across the UK and nearshore teams Implement best practices in testing (React Testing Library, Cypress), code quality , and CI/CD pipelines Work in an Agile environment delivering incremental value through reusable, testable components Engage in code reviews, feature planning, and performance optimization ✅ Requirements: At least 4 years overall development experience A balanced full-stack profile (50% frontend / 50% backend) Java 17+ & Spring Boot Strong frontend proficiency with React and/or Next.js (server components experience is a plus) TypeScript & JavaScript Experience with Tailwind CSS Microservices architecture and event-driven systems (Kafka or similar) PostgreSQL or similar relational databases Frontend testing: React Testing Library, Enzyme, Cypress Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions preferred) Excellent English communication skills Ability to collaborate effectively in Agile/Scrum teams 🛠 Nice to Have Familiarity with TDD , Kubernetes (AWS) , and cloud-native environments Exposure to BDD (Cucumber) or functional programming concepts Knowledge with Terraform 🌍 Why Cressoft? Cressoft has delivered high-impact tech talent and consulting services across the UK since 2011. As the exclusive offshore partner for one of the UK’s largest retail engineering organizations, we offer long-term remote roles where engineers contribute directly to systems used by millions every day. 🔗 Apply Now Click Apply and help shape the next-generation retail platform from wherever you are in Turkey. Let me know if you'd like a second version for email outreach or a shorter variation for LinkedIn job post preview.

title: REACT JS DEVELOPER
description: About vMind At vMind, we are a leading technology company in Cloud Solutions, Managed Services and System Integration. With experience across 26+ industries and deep expertise in cloud technologies, we deliver solutions that transform how businesses run and accelerate their digital journeys. Powered by strong global technology partnerships and our expert teams, we help organizations achieve their growth goals by providing cost-efficient, innovative and reliable IT services on top of our sovereign, high-performance cloud platforms. Mission of the Role As a React JS Developer, you will design and build modern, scalable, and user-centric front-end applications that power vMind’s digital platforms and enterprise solutions. Responsibilities Develop modern, responsive user interfaces using React.js. Collaborate closely with UI/UX designers, backend engineers, and product teams. Maintain, refactor, and enhance existing front-end applications. Optimize for performance, accessibility, and scalability. Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility. Write clean, reusable, and testable code with proper documentation. Participate in code reviews and agile ceremonies (planning, daily, retro). Qualifications 2+ years of hands-on experience with React.js. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3. Experience integrating RESTful APIs. Familiarity with Git and collaborative workflows (PRs, branching). Strong problem-solving and analytical skills. Ability to work both independently and in a team. Good command of English. Nice to Have TypeScript experience. State management (Redux, Zustand, or Context API). Next.js experience. Component libraries (Material UI, Ant Design) or Tailwind CSS. Basic testing (Jest, React Testing Library). Talent Pool Note If your profile is a close match, we may keep your application in the vMind Talent Pool for future opportunities.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: REST API mimarisi konusunda deneyimli, Node.js/Express ekosisteminde güçlü bir Full Stack Developer başvurularını bekliyoruz. Pozisyon: Full Stack Developer Çalışma Modeli: Hibrit Deneyim: En az 2-3 Yıl Neler Yapacaksın? • RESTful API'lerin tasarımı, geliştirilmesi ve bakımı • Şirket içi (in-house) yazılım çözümlerinin sıfırdan oluşturulması ve mevcut sistemlerin iyileştirilmesi • Frontend ve backend entegrasyonlarının uçtan uca yönetimi • Veritabanı modellemesi, sorgu optimizasyonu ve veri katmanı tasarımı • Mevcut API'lerin performans analizi, iyileştirme ve dokümantasyonu • Ekip içi kod incelemeleri (code review) ve teknik karar süreçlerine katkı Beklentilerimiz: • Node.js ve Express.js ile RESTful API tasarımı ve geliştirme konusunda güçlü deneyim • Frontend teknolojilerine hakimiyet (React, Vue.js vb.) • Veritabanı yönetimi (PostgreSQL, MongoDB vb.) • Git versiyon kontrol sistemi kullanımı • API güvenliği, authentication/authorization mekanizmaları (JWT, OAuth) • Temiz kod yazma, SOLID prensiplerine uygunluk Ek Nitelikler: • Docker ve CI/CD süreçlerine aşinalık • Mikroservis mimarisi deneyimi • Unit ve entegrasyon test yazma alışkanlığı • Agile/Scrum metodolojileriyle çalışma deneyimi

title: Rust Backend Developer | $60/hr Remote
description: Position: Rust Developer Type: Contract (Part-time) Compensation: $30 - $60/hour Location: Remote Commitment: 10–40 hours/week Role Responsibilities Design, develop, and optimize REST and GraphQL endpoints for scalable APIs Drive data validation, error handling, and security best practices within backend services Plan and execute database migrations, optimizations, and schema changes as needed Actively test new AI-powered models in Cursor, providing actionable feedback via incident reports, bug traces, and screenshots Participate in 4-day intensive testing bursts, exploring how AI models impact real coding workflows Engage thoughtfully with the research team in a dedicated Slack channel to discuss findings and propose improvements Submit detailed post-burst surveys, delivering insights on model performance and developer experience Requirements Professional experience as a backend developer with strong expertise in Rust Proficient in building and maintaining RESTful and GraphQL APIs Advanced understanding of backend data validation, error handling, and API security Hands-on experience with database migrations, performance tuning, and schema design Extensive use of AI tools for coding; familiarity with Cursor is highly desirable Outstanding written and verbal communication skills with clear incident and bug reporting Proven ability to thrive in fast-paced, confidential, and collaborative remote environments Visible contributions to open source (e.g., GitHub stars or contributions) Experience designing or evaluating experimental tooling and developer workflows Demonstrated enthusiasm for AI advancements in software development Application Process Upload resume Interview Submit form

title: Full Stack Developer ( React Native & React.js) – Mid Level
description: We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to join our team developing IoT and smart city solutions. The role involves working on mobile and frontend development, as well as contributing to backend tasks when needed. In this position, you will actively participate in building our web and mobile applications, working on real-time data-driven mobile apps, dashboards, and management panels . Responsibilities Develop iOS and Android mobile applications using React Native Build modern, scalable, and high-performance web applications using React.js Create data-driven dashboards, charts, and UI components using JavaScript Integrate frontend applications with backend services via REST APIs Support backend development processes using Node.js or similar technologies when needed Translate UI/UX designs (Figma, etc.) into high-quality, pixel-perfect code Maintain, improve, and optimize existing applications Requirements At least 2 years of experience with React Native for mobile development At least 2 years of experience with React.js Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+) Experience with REST API integration Proficiency with Git Knowledge of responsive design and cross-platform development Nice to Have Experience with backend development using Node.js Knowledge of TypeScript Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Zustand, Context API, etc.) Experience with charting / data visualization libraries Familiarity with UI libraries (Material UI, Ant Design, etc.) Experience with mobile app publishing processes (App Store / Google Play) Experience with IoT, data collection, or real-time systems

title: Sr. Backend Developer
description: Who Are We? PiA is specialized in delivering custom IT business solutions, professional and managed services especially in Business Support Systems’ domain since its establishment in 2009. Our engineering team growth rapidly and has proven track record of success in delivering BSS integration, customization and complete customer management solutions for several telecom service providers in Turkey and EMEA. In PiA we follow agile development practices, see each team member as key asset and value individual strengths, opinions and ideas in achieving goals. What Will You Do? Taking responsibility in the software development processes of PİA as Sr.Backend Developer Actively involving in all processes of the projects from the idea stage to the production Actively participating in technical designs and developing in accordance with technical design and development standards Closely following latest development trends, innovations. What Do You Need? BS or MS in Computer Science, Engineering or related fields Min. 5 years of experience Experience in Java Programming, Spring Framework (Spring Boot) Experience in Relational / NonRelational Database such as Postgresql, MongoDB Knowledge of professional software engineering best practices Ability of analytic thinking and problem solving Skilled in teamwork and successful in written and verbal communication Willing to improve and learn Creative and solution-focused Preferably having a certificate from KPDS, ÜDS, YDS, e-YDS, Cambridge, TOEFL IBT, or PTE exams. What do we offer? Free breakfast every morning, and free snacks throughout the day in the offices Private health insurance In-company training Transportation and meal support Flexible work hours Process: Application: Apply for the position via LinkedIn. Firt interview: If your application seems a good fit, we’ll contact you and get the details. Technical Interview: Let’s interview. (If your first interview meets expectations.) Decision: After your interview, you will get a response within 14 days. At PiA Group, we believe in the power of diversity and aim to create an inclusiveworkplace where everyone feels valued. As an equal opportunity employer, weevaluate all applicants without discrimination based on race, color, religion,gender, age, national or ethnic origin, sexual orientation, gender identity,marital status, or disability.

title: Backend Go Developer [Services]
description: Backend Go Developer [Services] About the Role We're looking for a Senior Go Developer to lead the design and development of our services You'll build and maintain systems that serve millions of users in real-time Responsibilities Collaborate with a broad spectrum of systems and technologies, resolving problems from end-to-end Design and develop reusable libraries Uphold code quality and ensure automation Engage in unit testing and integration testing Technical Skills Required 5+ years of building backend systems in Golang Strong command of PostgreSQL and Redis Proven experience with distributed systems, async workflows and Domain-Driven Design Proficiency with Docker, observability stacks, and RESTful APIs In-depth understanding of OOP, SOLID principles, and design patterns Prior experience with Microservices architecture Experience in cloud systems [GCP, AWS or Azure] Familiarity with modern frontend frameworks [React] is a plus

title: Full-Stack Developer with experience in Node.js, JavaScript/TypeScript, and AWS
description: About Eva Eva is a results-driven technology and services provider that helps eCommerce brands, resellers, and agencies maximize their growth while reducing operational costs. Eva combines proprietary optimization & intelligence software with Amazon management and 3PL services to optimize our client’s visibility, efficiency, and profitability of their Amazon and eCommerce operations. 90% of Eva’s customers are in the US. Eva has a bottom-up culture, where we expect each individual to drive their own business and apply Eva's principles to every single task. Eva's Principles are Customer Obsession, Accountability & Ownership, Remote Collaboration & Growth, Integrity, and Deliver Results. We believe in empowering each team member to drive their business forward while adhering to these guiding principles. Role Overview We are looking for a Full-Stack Developer with strong background in Node.js and JavaScript or TypeScript to help us build scalable, data-intensive web applications and internal platforms used by global eCommerce clients. This role requires balanced ownership across frontend, backend, and data systems, with exposure to modern event-driven and analytics-heavy architectures. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications using Node.js, React and Next.js Build and maintain scalable RESTful APIs and backend services Work with PostgreSQL for transactional systems and ClickHouse for analytics and large-scale event data Contribute to event-driven architectures using Kafka and/or RabbitMQ Develop and maintain data pipelines that process high-volume events such as orders, ads, user activity, and system events Optimize frontend performance using SSR, SSG, and ISR in Next.js Collaborate closely with product, design, and data teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions Integrate third-party APIs including Amazon, Shopify, and internal services Troubleshoot production issues and take ownership of performance, reliability, and scalability Write clean, testable, and well-documented code Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and technical decision-making Requirements At least 3-7 years of professional experience as a Full Stack Developer Must be based in Turkey Strong proficiency in React and Node.js and Next.js Experience with cloud platforms, particularly AWS Solid experience with JavaScript / TypeScript Backend development experience with Node.js and API design Experience working with PostgreSQL Good understanding of asynchronous systems, background jobs, and message-based processing Familiarity with event-driven architecture concepts Experience using Git and collaborative development workflows Ability to work effectively in a remote-first environment Strong written and verbal communication skills in English Nice to Have / Strong Plus Hands-on experience with Kafka and RabbitMQ Experience consuming and processing high-volume message streams Experience with ClickHouse or other analytical databases Familiarity with Redis for caching or queues Experience with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms (AWS preferred) Background in eCommerce, especially Amazon or Shopify ecosystems Exposure to microservices and distributed systems
